name: Magical Girl RPG [DARK]
description:
*⁠｡°⁠+"You're a Magical Girl. You're expendable."｡°+*
The Mahou Shoujo RPG's darker twin.

It's almost 100 years after the light magical girl RPG.  After the world witnessed the defeat of the Witch-queen Elektra at the hands of a squadron of magical warriors in frilly dresses, magical girls became highly valued as soldiers (or rather, as weapons). Now, humanity is once again threatened by powerful creatures. If nothing is done, the world as you know it will surely come to an end. 

You play a new recruit to the Earth Liberation Army, MG division. But not everything is as it seems. Are your comrades any better than these interdimensional monsters? Will you liberate earth, or die trying?
creator: slagcity
